case_title: KATHERINE ANNE KIMBALL VS. LISA JIMENEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,014.00 FILED BY KIMBALL, KATHERINE ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, LISA (FORMERLY MCGUIRE) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIMBALL, KATHERINE ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, LISA (FORMERLY MCGUIRE)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JIMENEZ, LISA (FORMERLY MCGUIRE)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-29-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF $500.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON APRIL 15, 2012 AND CONTINUING THEREAFTER ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL THE ENTIRE AMOUNT OF $4,014.00 IS PAID. IF DEFENDANT FAILES TO MAKE THE REQUIRED PAYMENT THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-19-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2012 - CONTINUED FOR STATUS ON PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-20-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MUST APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING TO EXPLAIN STATUS OF THE CASE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-19-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-19-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-26-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT HAS SENT A CASHIERS CHECK TO THE PLAINTIFF BY MAIL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 2/19/13. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
